ddls:
CREATE TABLE "action_items" (
  "action_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action item */,
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the objective the action item belongs to */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Deadline for the action item */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the action item (e.g., ongoing, on-schedule, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments for the action item */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level of the action item */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the action item starts */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the action item */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the action item */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the action item */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the action item was completed */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the action item */,
  "parent_action_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent action item (for hierarchical action items) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_items_objective_id FOREIGN KEY ("objective_id") REFERENCES objectives ("objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_items_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each objective */,
  "objective_name" TEXT /* Name of the objective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the objective */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level of the objective */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the objective starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date of the objective */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the objective */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the objective */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., ongoing, on-schedule, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code to visually represent the status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this status is the default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_item_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "action_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action item being assigned */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member the action item is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the action item was assigned */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was completed */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_item_assignments_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_item_assignments_action_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_item_id") REFERENCES action_items ("action_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., team lead, contributor, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the team member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the team member */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team member record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the team member record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "action_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action item the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., deadline reminder, assignment notification) */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_action_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_item_id") REFERENCES action_items ("action_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crash_data" (
  "crash_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crash */,
  "crash_date" TEXT /* Date the crash occurred */,
  "crash_location" TEXT /* Location of the crash */,
  "crash_description" TEXT /* Description of the crash */,
  "crash_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the crash */,
  "crash_type" TEXT /* Type of the crash (e.g., vehicle-vehicle, vehicle-pedestrian) */,
  "crash_time" TEXT /* Time the crash occurred */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the crash */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of the crash */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit at the crash location */,
  "speed_of_vehicles" TEXT /* Speed of vehicles involved in the crash */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crash_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crash_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "crash_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crash the analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_team" TEXT /* Team that performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the analysis */,
  "analysis_report" TEXT /* Link or reference to the analysis report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crash_analysis_crash_id FOREIGN KEY ("crash_id") REFERENCES crash_data ("crash_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_safety_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the program started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the program */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the program */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the program */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the program */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_item_objectives" (
  "action_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action item */,
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* ID of the objective the action item belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the association */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the association */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_item_id", "objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_item_status_history" (
  "action_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action item */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status the action item was updated to */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the status history entry */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the status history entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_item_id", "status_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_item_status_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)
